name: Carob Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 9-inch square baking pan.
2. Melt the carob chips in a heavy, small saucepan over very low heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in the sweetened condensed milk, pecans, and vanilla until combined. Spread in the prepared pan.
4. Score the fudge into squares with a knife. Refrigerate until firm.
5. Cut into squares. Store in the refrigerator. Bring to room temperature before serving.
Note: Carob chips can be found in natural food stores. Makes about 1 1/2 pounds.
